_comment: Horologion normalized office payload schema v1. All fields marked required:true must be present for validateOfficePayload() to pass.

tradition.note: Tradition code — BYZC (Byzantine Catholic/Orthodox), COE, ETH, ANG, etc.

officeKey.note: Canonical office identifier matching the skeleton JSON filename.

variant.note: Variant label — baseline, great, small, festal, lenten, etc.

status.note: partial | complete | error. 'partial' indicates unresolved placeholder slots remain.

sections.note: Ordered array of section objects as defined below.

diagnostics.note: Runtime diagnostic counters produced by resolveOffice().

id.note: Stable kebab-case identifier for this section.

type.note: Item type drives rendering strategy in the UI adapter.

key.note: Stable camelCase or kebab-case key; used for slot identity in diagnostics.

text.note: Resolved text content. Absent on placeholder items.

status.note: Omit for fully resolved items; set to 'unresolved' for placeholder slots.

note.note: Developer-facing diagnostic note, surfaced in validateOfficePayload() output.

implementedSlots.note: Count of items with type != placeholder and status != unresolved.

placeholderSlots.note: Count of items with type == placeholder or status == unresolved.

warnings.note: Array of warning strings from validation or resolution. Empty array when clean.

traditionCodes.COE: Church of the East (East Syriac / Hudra)
